title: dioscorea planistipulosa
intro: Dioscorea planistipulosa, also known as the two-stemmed yam, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea planistipulosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Dioscorea planistipulosa is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application or added to food as a nutritional supplement.
